description: Kinetic Agent — execute handlers on edge agents for on-premise system access. Bridges cloud workflows to systems behind firewalls.
icon: <svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" width="20" height="20"><circle cx="12" cy="12" r="12" fill="#F36C24"/><text x="12" y="16.5" text-anchor="middle" font-size="13" font-weight="700" font-family="sans-serif" fill="white">A</text></svg>

routines.name: Agent Execute Handler
routines.description: Executes a handler loaded on a remote Kinetic Agent.

inputs.name: Handler Slug
inputs.description: Slug of the handler to execute on the agent.

inputs.name: Payload
inputs.description: JSON payload to pass to the handler.
